name: Microwave Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 32-ounce Jar spaghetti sauce (I use Prego Green Label) mixed with
1 pound ricotta cheese mixed with 1 egg
12 ounces shredded mozzarella or sliced mozzarella
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer ingredients in a 9x13 pyrex pan, in this order: sauce, half the noodles, half the ricotta, half the mozzarella, sauce, noodles, ricotta, mozzarella, sauce.
2. Cover tightly with Saran wrap.
3. Cook on HIGH for 8 to 8 1/2 minutes and MEDIUM LOW for 32 minutes (adjust time if using a different wattage microwave).
4. Remove Saran wrap, sprinkle with Parmesan, cover again, and let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
